name: Patient Case
history: History of isolation and chronic depression since late adolescence. Past difficulties with friendships. Recent breakup preceding a relapse into a depressive episode. History of taking SSRIs and recent medication adjustments following the relapse.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: If I try to connect with others, I will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't handle being alone, but I can't connect with others.
coping_strategies: Avoidance through watching television instead of engaging in planned activities.
situation: Planned a weekend for sewing and catching up on work tasks. Was unable to focus on familiar tasks and spent the day watching television.
auto_thought: I can't do anything right, and I'll always be alone.
behavior: Avoided planned activities and engaged in passive activities like watching television.
